---
title: "Assignment_03"
name: "Sharon Tsukernik"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-03-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Loading libraries
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(vegan)
library(ggplot2)
library(phyloseq)
library(ANCOMBC)
library(microbiome)

# to install ANCOMBC
#install.packages("remotes")
#remotes::install_github("FrederickHuangLin/ANCOMBC")
#BiocManager::install("microbiome")

```

```{r}
# Importing and combining bracken files

files <- list.files(pattern = "\\.bracken$")

# Reading eaach file and adding sample name
bracken_list <- lapply(files, function(file) {
  df <- read_tsv(file)
  df$sample <- file  
  return(df)
})

# Combining all samples into one dataframe
combined <- bind_rows(bracken_list)
head(combined)

# Cleaning sample names by removing .bracken
combined$sample <- gsub(".bracken", "", combined$sample)

write_tsv(combined, "results/bracken_output.txt")

table(combined$sample)

unique(combined$taxonomy_lvl)

# Filtering to Species
combined_species <- combined %>%
  filter(taxonomy_lvl == "S")

# Converting to abundance matrix
otu <- combined_species %>%
  select(sample, name, new_est_reads) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = name,
              values_from = new_est_reads,
              values_fill = 0)

head(otu)

otu_mat <- as.data.frame(otu)

# Sample name as rownames
rownames(otu_mat) <- otu_mat$sample
otu_mat <- otu_mat[,-1]

dim(otu_mat)

write.csv(otu_mat, "results/otu_matrix.csv")

# creating taxonomy table
tax <- data.frame(Species = colnames(otu_mat))
rownames(tax) <- colnames(otu_mat)

# Creating metadata
metadata <- data.frame(
  Sample = rownames(otu_mat),
  Diet = ifelse(rownames(otu_mat) %in% c("SRR8146935","SRR8146936","SRR8146938"),
                "Omnivore",
                "Vegan")
)

rownames(metadata) <- metadata$Sample
```


```{r}
# Building phyloseq object
ps <- phyloseq(
  otu_table(otu_mat, taxa_are_rows = FALSE),
  tax_table(as.matrix(tax)),
  sample_data(metadata)
)

ps

sample_data(ps)

# Rarefaction curve
otu_mat_rc <- as(otu_table(ps), "matrix")

# Ensuring samples are rows
if(taxa_are_rows(ps)) {
  otu_mat_rc <- t(otu_mat_rc)
}

rownames(otu_mat_rc) <- paste0(
  rownames(otu_mat_rc),
  ifelse(rownames(otu_mat_rc) %in% c("SRR8146935","SRR8146936","SRR8146938"),
         "_omnivore",
         "_vegan")
)

par(mar = c(5, 5, 2, 2))

# Rarecurve
rarecurve(otu_mat_rc,
          step = 5000,
          cex = 0.6,
          col = "black")


```

```{r} 
# Taxonomic abundance (relative abundance)

# Converting counts to relative abundance
ps_rel <- transform_sample_counts(ps, function(x) x / sum(x))

# Converting phyloseq object to df
df <- psmelt(ps_rel)

head(df)

# Removing duplicate column
df <- df %>% select(-sample_Sample)

# Getting top 10 most abundant species
top_taxa <- df %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Abundance)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  pull(Species)

# Grouping remaining taxa as "other"
df_clean <- df %>%
  mutate(Species_clean = ifelse(Species %in% top_taxa, Species, "Other")) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Species_clean) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop")

# Adding diet groups
df_clean <- df_clean %>%
  mutate(Diet = ifelse(Sample %in% c("SRR8146935","SRR8146936","SRR8146938"),
                       "Omnivore",
                       "Vegan"))

abundance_plot <- ggplot(df_clean, aes(x = Sample, y = Abundance, fill = Species_clean)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~Diet, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(y = "Relative Abundance", x = "Sample", fill = "Species") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

abundance_plot

ggsave("figures/relative_abundance.png", plot = abundance_plot, width = 10, height = 6)


```

```{r}
# Alpha diversity

plot_richness(ps)

# Shannon index
alpha_df <- estimate_richness(ps, measures = c("Shannon"))
alpha_df$Sample <- rownames(alpha_df)
alpha_df$Diet <- metadata$Diet

alpha_plot <- ggplot(alpha_df, aes(x = Diet, y = Shannon, fill = Diet)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Alpha Diversity (Shannon Index)",
       x = "Diet", y = "Shannon Diversity") +
  theme_minimal()

alpha_plot

ggsave("figures/alpha_diversity.png", plot = alpha_plot)


# T-test
ttest_res <- t.test(Shannon ~ Diet, data = alpha_df)
ttest_res
capture.output(ttest_res, file = "results/alpha_ttest.txt")

alpha_df %>%
  group_by(Diet) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Shannon),
    sd = sd(Shannon),
    n = n()
  )
```

```{r}
# Beta diversity (PCoA + PERMANOVA)

# Ordination
ord <- ordinate(ps, method = "PCoA", distance = "bray")

plot_data <- plot_ordination(ps, ord, justDF = TRUE)
plot_data$Sample <- rownames(plot_data)
plot_data$Diet <- metadata$Diet

pcoa_plot <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Axis.1, y = Axis.2, color = Diet)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Sample), vjust = -1) +
  labs(title = "PCoA (Bray-Curtis)",
       x = "PCoA1", y = "PCoA2") +
  theme_minimal()

pcoa_plot

ggsave("figures/pcoa.png", plot = pcoa_plot)

# PERMANOVA
dist_mat <- phyloseq::distance(ps, method = "bray")
permanova_res <- adonis2(dist_mat ~ Diet, data = metadata)
permanova_res
capture.output(permanova_res, file = "results/permanova.txt")

```

```{r}
# Differential abundance (ANCOMBC2)

ancombc.out <- ancombc2(
  data = ps,
  tax_level = "Species",
  fix_formula = "Diet",
  group = "Diet",
  p_adj_method = "holm",
  prv_cut = 0,
  lib_cut = 0
)

res <- ancombc.out$res
head(res)

# Removing NA's
res_clean <- res %>% filter(!is.na(lfc_DietVegan))

# Identifying significant taxa
sig_taxa <- res[res$q_DietVegan < 0.05, ]
sig_taxa
# none

# Top taxa for visualization
top_res <- res_clean %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(lfc_DietVegan))) %>%
  slice(1:15)

ancom_plot <- ggplot(top_res, aes(x = lfc_DietVegan, y = reorder(taxon, lfc_DietVegan))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin = lfc_DietVegan - se_DietVegan,
                    xmax = lfc_DietVegan + se_DietVegan)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "red") +
  labs(x = "Log Fold Change (Vegan vs Omnivore)",
       y = "Species") +
  theme_minimal()

ancom_plot

ggsave("figures/ancombc.png", plot = ancom_plot)

# Save full ANCOMBC results
write.csv(res, "results/ancombc_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)


```
